name: x402-error-settlement-timeout
description: Golden fixture for HTTP 504 X402_SETTLEMENT_TIMEOUT with subcause=facilitator_slow (facilitator did not respond within the configured 5s timeout).
scenario: facilitator response delayed beyond Hub's timeout — Hub aborts cleanly without on-chain commitment

facilitator_calls.behavior: no response after 8 seconds (exceeds Hub's 5s timeout)

error.message: x402 facilitator at https://x402.org/facilitator did not respond within 5s; settlement aborted.

next_action.hint: x402 settlement is currently degraded. Top up the wallet to use the alternative payment method.

postconditions: x402_settlements has NO row for this request_id
Better Stack receives a `x402.facilitator.timeout` metric increment
if circuit breaker threshold (5 timeouts in 30s) is reached, subsequent x402 invokes return X402_FACILITATOR_UNREACHABLE with subcause=facilitator_circuit_open until the circuit closes
